docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STEVEN T. POLINO'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE AND MOTION TO DISMISS UNVERIFIED CIVIL COMPLAINT FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS FOR LACK OF JURISDICTION IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT PROVIDE ANY EVIDENCE TO SUPPORT ITS CONTENTION THAT CONTRACT BETWEEN PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT WAS ON-GOING AND WITHIN THIS STATE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI; REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-28-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 302
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-05-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2011 Off Calendar

MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
Off Calendar Jun-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT STEVEN T. POLINO'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE AND MOTION TO DISMISS UNVERIFIED CIVIL COMPLAINT FOR LACK OF PERSONAL JURISDICTION. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: defendant's motion to quash service of summons for lack of jurisdiction is granted. Plaintiff does not provide any evidence to support its contention that contract between plaintiff and defendant was on-going and within this state. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
